text.message: Hey black...I'm sorry but I can't let you have that port
I'm leading army; I don't think anyone will catch up
I mean...my plan is to catch up
Blue you are the clear leader, it's funny you are so vocal
It's still a social game with communiction
And, I don't think I"m leading now
Not quite enough to win, but he's close
Just was a dev but defo gonna 7 now haha
